description: Apache Hadoop YARN Server Common contains shared server-side services, protocol helpers, and utility classes used by YARN ResourceManager, NodeManager, and related server components. It supports coordination of cluster resource management features such as node registration, container lifecycle handling, shared cache management, and server configuration within Hadoop YARN.

Apache Hadoop YARN Server Common contains shared server-side services, protocol helpers, and utility classes used by YARN ResourceManager, NodeManager, and related server components. It supports coordination of cluster resource management features such as node registration, container lifecycle handling, shared cache management, and server configuration within Hadoop YARN.

Apache Hadoop YARN Server Common provides shared server-side classes, services, and protocol helpers used by YARN components such as the ResourceManager and NodeManager. It supports cluster resource-management infrastructure including node registration, container lifecycle handling, shared cache coordination, and server configuration within Hadoop YARN.
